postmark.Subject: Re: Purchase — Marcus Webb
postmark.TextBody:
Correction — this is actually a refinance, not a purchase. Marcus Webb already owns the property at 1142 Tory Road NW, Edmonton, AB T6R 2K8; we're refinancing the existing first mortgage with Royal Bank of Canada (balance $225k from the attached statement). Sorry for the confusion — please treat as refinance.
